description: Explicit allowlist of files that ship to the public repo (Agents.Domdhi). Consumed by .claude/core/publish.js. A hardcoded DEFAULT_EXCLUDES list in publish.js ALWAYS applies on top of this — see publish.js for the safety-net set (handoff, .output, todo, research, app, design, timeline, settings.local.json, .git, node_modules, __tests__, _helpers).
